zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Coffin於大約1440年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir William Coffyn19歲，母親Margaret Giffard38歲。他於1457年與Alice Gambon在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年在英國戴文享年84歲，埋葬在英國戴文希藍頓 普查亞登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Coffin于大约1440年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir William Coffyn19岁，母亲Margaret Giffard38岁。他于1457年与Alice Gambon在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年在英国戴文享年84岁，埋葬在英国戴文希藍頓 普查亞登。

nameMeanings.name: Coffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern England, of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Middle English cofin, coffin, Old French cof(f)in (from Late Latin cophinus, Greek kophinos) ‘container, basket; coffer, chest (for keeping treasures, documents, armour, etc.)’. Early bearers of this as a hereditary surname were of knightly rank. Old French cofin was synonymous with coffer, and it may be that Cofin was used to denote a keeper of the (royal) coffer, attested in Anglo-Latin cofferarius. Compare Coffer . The modern English word coffin is a specialized development of this term, not attested until the 16th century.
History: Tristram Coffin came from Brixham, Devon, to Haverhill, MA, before 1647. An important line of his descendants is associated with Nantucket and Martha's Vineyard.

variants.name: Coffer
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English cofre, coffre, coffer ‘box, chest’ (from Old French cof(f)rehere), used to denote a box or coffer maker (Old French coffrier), perhaps also for a treasurer.
Probably also an Americanized form of German Kaufer or Kauffer.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Coffin was born about 1440, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Coffyn, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Giffard, was 38. He married Alice Gambon in 1457, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1523, in Devon, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Heanton Punchardon, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Coffin est né environ 1440, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Coffyn, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Giffard, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gambon en 1457, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1523, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Heanton Punchardon, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Coffin um 1440 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Coffyn 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Giffard 38. Er hat 1457 in Devon, England Alice Gambon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1523 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Heanton Punchardon, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Coffin è nato il circa 1440 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Coffyn, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Giffard, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Alice Gambon nel 1457, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1523, nel Devon, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Heanton Punchardon, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Coffinが約1440年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir William Coffynは19歳，母Margaret Giffardは38歳であった。1457年にイギリスデボンでAlice Gambonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年にイギリスデボンで84歳で死去し，イギリスデボンヒーントン プウンチャードンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Coffin(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Coffyn(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Giffard(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1457년 영국 데폰에서 Alice Gambon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 영국 데폰에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 히턴 푸처든에 묻혔다.

pt.from 9 November 1510 to 8 November 1511: de 9 de novembro de 1510 a 8 de novembro de 1511
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Coffin nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Coffyn, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Giffard, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gambon em 1457, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1523, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Heanton Punchardon, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Coffin родился около 1440 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Coffyn было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Giffard, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gambon в 1457 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1523 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности хинтон пунчардон, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Gambon en 1457, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
